location.description: Incus instance to back up: incus://<instance-name>

socket.description: Path to the Incus unix socket (mutually exclusive with url)

url.description: Remote Incus server URL (https://host:8443); requires tls_client_cert and tls_client_key, mutually exclusive with socket

tls_client_cert.description: Path to the PEM client certificate trusted by the remote server (remote only)

tls_client_key.description: Path to the PEM client key matching tls_client_cert (remote only)

tls_server_cert.description: Path to the remote server's PEM certificate to pin a self-signed server; without it the system CA store must trust the server (remote only)

tls_ca.description: Path to the PEM CA certificate for servers running in PKI mode (remote only)

project.description: Incus project the instance lives in (defaults to "default")

backup_ttl.description: Expiry (Go duration) of the temporary server-side backup, a safety net if cleanup never runs

cleanup_timeout.description: Maximum wait (Go duration) for the server-side backup deletion after the export
